display.purpose: Hero titles and cinematic section moments.

editorial.purpose: Single article H1s and magazine-like reading moments.

body.purpose: Prose, summaries, descriptions, and UI copy.

numeric.purpose: Dates, ranks, views, reading time, and other tabular values.

shadows.name: editor-card-lift
shadows.purpose: Light-mode editor picks and image-led feature cards.

shadows.name: focus-glow
shadows.purpose: Keyboard focus and critical interactive outlines.

motion.name: ease-out-quint
motion.purpose: Hero image, loader, and polished entrance movement.

motion.name: image-reveal
motion.purpose: Poster and hero image scale, saturation, and brightness changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Gold editorial CTA used for newsletter signup and primary actions.
components.css: .ds-button-primary { min-height: 3rem; border: 0; border-radius: var(--radius-md, 8px); background: var(--color-primary, #C9A227); color: var(--color-nocturnal-slate, #0B0B0E); padding: 0.85rem 1rem; font-family: var(--font-body, system-ui); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 800; cursor: pointer; transition: filter 200ms ease, transform 200ms ease; } .ds-button-primary:hover { filter: brightness(0.94); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-button-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--color-gold-tint, #E6CB6A); outline-offset: 2px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-focus, 0 0 0 3px rgba(230, 203, 106, 0.42)); }

components.name: Category Chip
components.description: Pill chip for categories, article tags, and suggested searches.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; min-height: 2.5rem; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; padding: 0.45rem 0.9rem; border: 1px solid var(--color-mist, #E2E8F0); border-radius: var(--radius-pill, 9999px); background: var(--color-warm-ash, #ECE7DC); color: var(--color-slate-700, #334155); font-family: var(--font-body, system-ui); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 200ms ease, color 200ms ease; } .ds-chip:hover, .ds-chip:focus-visible { border-color: rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.45); color: var(--color-primary-hover, #B88F1E); outline: none; }

components.name: Editorial Card
components.description: Image-led article card with quiet border, dark tonal surface, and gold focus border.
components.html:
اختيارات التحرير

عنوان مقال سينمائي طويل
components.css: .ds-card { overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid rgba(234, 230, 220, 0.08); border-radius: var(--radius-lg, 12px); background: var(--color-ink-elevated, #16161B); color: var(--color-text-on-ink, #EAE6DC); box-shadow: var(--shadow-card, 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.04) inset, 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)); transition: transform 250ms ease, border-color 250ms ease; } .ds-card:hover, .ds-card:focus-within { transform: translateY(-3px); border-color: rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.44); } .ds-card-media { aspect-ratio: 16 / 10; background: radial-gradient(circle at 28% 20%, rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.18), transparent 34%), linear-gradient(135deg, var(--color-ink-elevated, #16161B), var(--color-ink, #0B0B0E)); } .ds-card-body { padding: 1.15rem; } .ds-card span { color: var(--color-gold-tint, #E6CB6A); font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 700; } .ds-card h3 { margin: 0.6rem 0 0; font-family: var(--font-display, system-ui); font-size: 1.25rem; line-height: 1.45; font-weight: 800; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Large archive-search field for the cinematic overlay.
components.css: .ds-search { display: grid; gap: 0.75rem; color: var(--color-text-on-ink, #EAE6DC); font-family: var(--font-body, system-ui); } .ds-search span { font-family: var(--font-display, system-ui); font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 800; } .ds-search input { min-height: 3.75rem; border: 1px solid rgba(234, 230, 220, 0.16); border-radius: var(--radius-lg, 12px); background: var(--color-ink, #0B0B0E); color: var(--color-text-on-ink, #EAE6DC); padding: 1rem 1.25rem; font-size: 1.125rem; line-height: 1.6; } .ds-search input:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--color-gold-tint, #E6CB6A); outline-offset: 2px; border-color: rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.52); }

components.name: Feature Hero
components.description: Full-bleed cinematic lead story surface with shaded imagery and one editorial CTA.
components.html:
اختيارات التحرير

رحلة داخل عالم الفيلم

اقرأ المقال
components.css: .ds-hero { position: relative; min-height: 34rem; overflow: hidden; border-radius: var(--radius-lg, 12px); background: radial-gradient(circle at 16% 18%, rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.14), transparent 34%), linear-gradient(180deg, var(--color-ink, #0B0B0E) 0%, var(--color-deep-shadow, #020617) 55%, var(--color-nocturnal-slate, #0B0B0E) 100%); color: var(--color-text-on-ink, #EAE6DC); } .ds-hero-shade { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(2, 6, 23, 0.9), rgba(2, 6, 23, 0.2), rgba(2, 6, 23, 0.72)); } .ds-hero-content { position: relative; z-index: 1; width: min(100%, 46rem); padding: clamp(6rem, 12vw, 10rem) 1rem clamp(4rem, 8vw, 7rem); } .ds-hero p { color: var(--color-gold-tint, #E6CB6A); font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 700; } .ds-hero h1 { margin: 0.75rem 0 1.25rem; font-family: var(--font-display, system-ui); font-size: clamp(2.75rem, 6vw, 5.5rem); line-height: 1.05; font-weight: 800; } .ds-hero span { display: inline-flex; min-height: 2.75rem; align-items: center; font-weight: 700; }

narrative.overview: Mazaq Cinema is a dark, poster-led Arabic-first editorial system. It should feel like entering a curated cinema room: warm gold glints, near-black surfaces, cream text, bold Arabic titles, and film imagery that carries the atmosphere rather than decorating the page. The system is brand-register, not utility-register. Design creates the publication's credibility.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-first cinematic surfaces with warm, tinted neutrals.
Poster and still imagery as primary editorial material.
Tajawal for confident display, Amiri for long-form editorial headlines, IBM Plex Sans Arabic for body clarity.
Gold used as a rare editorial signal, not decoration.
Motion is atmospheric and restrained, using scale, opacity, and image treatment rather than layout movement.

rules.name: The Gold Is Rare Rule
rules.body: Gold is a signal, not trim. If every card, heading, and icon is gold, nothing is important.

rules.name: The No Netflix Costume Rule
rules.body: Claret may create editorial tension, but never combine it with black as a red-streaming-service costume.

rules.name: The Arabic Letterforms Rule
rules.body: Arabic labels do not get tracked uppercase treatment. Preserve connected forms with zero letter-spacing, contextual alternates, ligatures, and RTL-aware spacing.

rules.name: The Screen Depth Rule
rules.body: Depth comes from imagery, tonal layers, and controlled shadows. Do not stack nested cards to fake hierarchy.

dos: Do keep cinema imagery dominant on discovery surfaces; posters and stills are editorial evidence.
Do use Projector Gold sparingly for CTAs, ranks, focus, and category emphasis.
Do preserve Arabic typography with zero tracking, strong line-height, and RTL-aware layout.
Do keep reduced-motion support for loaders, image movement, overlays, and scroll interactions.
donts: Don't use generic WordPress news and blog templates.
Don't use Netflix-copycat red and black cliches.
Don't use weak Arabic typography, tracked Arabic labels, or cramped reading measures.
Don't use cluttered entertainment portals or clickbait visual systems.
Don't treat film imagery as decoration instead of editorial substance.
